ksa_text: Skill in querying and extracting data from relational databases, data warehouses, and analytical repositories using SQL and programmatic methods, including writing performant queries against large datasets.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-S-002 (Core Abilities/Skill) scores 0.433 composite (highest: NICE at 0.433) and is in_scope for the Data Engineer role. The KSA covers data modeling, schema design, and database work that are core Data Engineer competencies. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with in_scope scope, NICE signal (0.433), and Core Abilities handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support this Core Ability as a distinct Data Engineer competency at IC/senior IC level?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: General abilities appear implicitly in DE postings but rarely as discrete competencies. When explicit, they appear in context of pipeline design, data modeling, or quality enforcement (DE signals here: 2, composite: 0.433).
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Core ability with 2 DE signals and composite 0.433 reflects market-relevant technical judgment. Final decision: include.

decision_rationale: KSA AB-S-002 (Core Abilities/Skill) scores 0.433 composite (highest: NICE at 0.433) and is in_scope for the Data Engineer role. The KSA covers data modeling, schema design, and database work that are core Data Engineer competencies. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.
